personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | Capacity Planning & AI-Driven Infrastructure Optimization
personal.address: Murphy, TX (Plano area) / 424 Oriole Dr., Murphy, TX 75094

summary: Senior Data Engineer with over 20 years of enterprise experience, specializing in designing scalable data architectures and building robust ETL/ELT pipelines using Python, PySpark, and AWS cloud platforms. Proficient in data integration, transformation, and curation, with a focus on data quality and real-time processing for actionable insights. Experienced in leveraging machine learning and big data techniques to optimize data workflows and drive business value. Skilled in modern data platforms like Databricks and Apache Spark, with a strong foundation in data warehousing and dimensional modeling. Passionate about contributing to McAfee’s mission of delivering cutting-edge personal security solutions through innovative data-driven strategies. Eager to collaborate with cross-functional teams to unlock the potential of data assets in a dynamic, hybrid work environment in Frisco, TX.

flagship_projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
flagship_projects.description: Designed a full serverless data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, and Bedrock. Built a Text-to-SQL GenAI agent with Claude 3 Sonnet for enhanced querying. Resolved small file issues using Snappy and Parquet compression. Optimized ETL processes and data access for enterprise-scale operations.

flagship_projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
flagship_projects.description: Replaced legacy manual processes with a parallel generator-based pipeline, reducing forecasting cycles by 90%. Developed an interactive Streamlit dashboard for real-time capacity insights and 'High Trust' utilization scores. Engineered a modern agentic pipeline for banking-scale telemetry. Featured comprehensive documentation, API guides, and performance benchmarks.

flagship_projects.name: FAST Project
flagship_projects.description: Conducted data mining of user performance metrics to optimize critical money-generating systems.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated ETL pipelines using Python and Pandas to ingest P95 telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing manual processes with scalable solutions.
Developed machine learning forecasting models with Prophet and scikit-learn to predict capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead, enhancing provisioning accuracy.
Designed optimized Oracle schemas for historical data retention, enabling seasonal risk forecasting and strategic insights.
Built unified reporting systems integrating disparate data feeds into executive dashboards for actionable business intelligence.
Applied statistical analysis and data mining to identify underutilized infrastructure, driving significant cost savings through hardware consolidation.
Automated data quality workflows with monitoring and validation frameworks to ensure accuracy and consistency across pipelines.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics for critical systems, ensuring performance monitoring for Brand.com.
Led 'FAST' project to data-mine real-user performance metrics, providing optimization recommendations for key systems.
Upgraded Dynatrace from 6.5 to 7.0, implemented TLS1.2 security, and supported cloud migration to AWS.
Developed dashboards for end-to-end functionality and before/after performance metrics analysis.
Analyzed system bottlenecks and proposed actionable performance improvements.
Integrated Performance Center with Dynatrace for comprehensive monitoring solutions.

experience.title: APM Consultant
bullets: Supported enterprise CA APM, CEM, and ADA for utility systems, ensuring robust monitoring.
Managed and maintained monitoring solutions to optimize performance across critical infrastructure.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Led large-scale CA APM implementations and upgrades (9.1 to 10.1), managing 4,000–6,000 agents for enterprise clients.
Designed custom Management Modules, dashboards, and alerts, along with Perl/Ksh scripts for data extraction.
Provided sizing recommendations, created Golden Images, and delivered client training on APM solutions.
Collaborated with IT teams to troubleshoot and resolve performance bottlenecks in J2EE and .NET environments.
Optimized agent and enterprise manager installations for scalability and efficiency.
Documented implementations and supported clients with tailored training programs.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom applications to identify load and break points, focusing on performance optimization.
Documented critical metrics including JDBC connections, threads, memory, CPU, and garbage collection.
Installed JMX, Thread Dumps, and Wily Introscope for detailed monitoring and analysis.
Created automation scripts to streamline performance testing processes.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster for a high-throughput shopping engine.
Optimized C++/OCCI transaction processing, reducing hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second latency.
Built a CPPUNIT testing framework to automate conversion and ensure data integrity.
Collaborated with teams to refactor systems for enhanced performance and scalability.

experience.title: Architect/Developer (IRS CADE Project)
bullets: Performed UML-based unit design and developed modules for IRS modernization using CICS/MQSeries/XML/DB2.
Contributed to system architecture for high-stakes data processing environments.
Developed solutions with VC++ and DB2 to support critical messaging architecture.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed high-availability multithreaded C++ interfaces using POSIX, sockets, and Marconi APIs for billing systems.
Enhanced performance in billing processes with C/C++/Pro*C/PL/SQL, achieving 75% memory reduction and 10x database performance.
Automated system administration for WebLogic/WebSphere environments using Korn Shell scripts.
Designed and implemented interfaces with UML, leveraging design patterns for robust solutions.
Troubleshot and maintained critical modules like Enabler/CSM/EMS, ensuring operational continuity.
Supported production environments with database queries and performance reporting.

experience.title: Developer
bullets: Developed time and attendance interfaces using VB6 and VC++ for operational efficiency.

experience.title: Lab Support
bullets: Maintained and troubleshot Linux and Windows systems, supporting lab operations.
Performed various administrative tasks to ensure smooth functioning of IT infrastructure.
